violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Puddings, salads, and desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were removed from self-service case and placed behind the counter. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in drawers, on shelves, and on the deli line . New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: rack for dirty dishes fryers can opener base can opener trash cans prep units cupboards portion cup drawers panini press deli display case freezers . New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The floors, walls, and kitchen ceiling have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
Ceiling tile in the kitchen is stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

The hand sink in the sandwich area is in poor repair, with a screw missing on a faucet handle, and the seal along the splash guard missing in areas. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen and front service area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
